query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.leadsFound,
  c.lastSyncAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(c.lastSyncAt/1000) as lastSyncHuman,
  COUNT(l.id) as actualLeadCount,
  MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(l.discoveredAt/1000)) as latestLeadDiscovered
FROM outreach_campaigns c
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.campaignId = c.id
WHERE c.id = 30001
GROUP BY c.id;
command:

  MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(l.discoveredAt/1000)) as latestLeadDiscovered

LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.campaignId = c.id

GROUP BY c.id;
